daily_verses.arabic: وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُمْ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنَ الْخَوْفِ وَالْجُوعِ وَنَقْصٍ مِّنَ الْأَمْوَالِ وَالْأَنفُسِ وَالثَّمَرَاتِ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ الصَّابِرِينَ
daily_verses.translation: And We will surely test you with something of fear and hunger and a loss of wealth and lives and fruits, but give good tidings to the patient.

daily_verses.arabic: فَإِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا إِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
daily_verses.translation: For indeed, with hardship will be ease. Indeed, with hardship will be ease.

daily_verses.arabic: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ ۚ وَكَفَىٰ بِاللَّهِ وَكِيلًا
daily_verses.translation: And put your trust in Allah, and sufficient is Allah as Disposer of affairs.
Indeed, Allah is with the patient.

daily_verses.arabic: وَإِذَا سَأَلَكَ عِبَادِي عَنِّي فَإِنِّي قَرِيبٌ ۖ أُجِيبُ دَعْوَةَ الدَّاعِ إِذَا دَعَانِ
daily_verses.translation: And when My servants ask you concerning Me - indeed I am near. I respond to the invocation of the supplicant when he calls upon Me.
Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.

daily_verses.arabic: وَلَا تَهِنُوا وَلَا تَحْزَنُوا وَأَنتُمُ الْأَعْلَوْنَ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
daily_verses.translation: So do not weaken and do not grieve, and you will be superior if you are [true] believers.

daily_verses.arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ وَالصَّلَاةِ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ مَعَ الصَّابِرِينَ
daily_verses.translation: O you who have believed, seek help through patience and prayer. Indeed, Allah is with the patient.
And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.
Indeed, your Lord is in observation.
